flag: A skimming reader may chain '9–20 … 22' into a range ending at 22; repeating 'klo' before 22 reduces but does not eliminate the risk — the two range-like numbers in close proximity can visually fuse. Consider '... sekä erikseen klo 22' or reordering to 'klo 22 sekä klo 9–20' to break the chain.
